emails.subject: EBS State Assignments Map
emails.body: Jeff, I think this expands your scope. (Which is, of course, a good thing as long as it fits with all of the other things you're doing). What is your preference? Sue Forwarded by Sue Nord/NA/Enron on 12/13/2000 09:41 AM Margo Reyna 12/12/2000 11:12 AM

emails.subject: Re: EBS State Assignments Map
emails.body: Re: EBS State Assignments Map Being a true blue American, I support expansion. If you get a free minute, can you give me a call to discuss. My short answer is--no problem, looks good.
